judge_result.short_rationale: The core rinse action and the do-not-delay warning match the structured truth. However, the escalation was overgeneralized to always seek medical attention, instead of only when symptoms persist after washing or the exposure was substantial. That drops a source-backed condition and adds ungrounded urgency.
